text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a fan meet and greet in the shopping
district today, which Special Week will be
participating in. I'm there waiting for her when...
La la laaa! Badum deedum! ♪ La dee dah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Have no fear, for Special Week is
here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Just gettin' ready to rock-'n'-rule as the
Ruler of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I happened to overhear yesterday that an actor in
Opera O's play couldn't make it, and that there
was an opening available!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When I learned it was for the role of a feudal
ruler, I thought of this signature racewear and
realized that it was surely fate!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And before I knew it, I had volunteered to fill in
for the role!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, the show's about to start, so you should
come watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is as confident as ever, but I'm
really worried. She was chosen for the role only
yesterday. Does she even know her lines?
choice_data_list: Are you sure you know the script?
Are you sure you know the script?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine! Opera O will handle the important
dialogue, and all I have to do is improvise lines
that sound lordly!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oops, I'd better get ready! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look on as she runs toward the stage that has
been built in the shopping district. I guess the
least I can do is watch her performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Father, isn't there anything we can do to
make you accept our engagement?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... Absolutely not! I refuse! And I'll never
change my mind on the matter!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: But why?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Because, uh, as the ruler... I don't really
want to!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my lord! Is your refusal due to my lowly
status? Am I not fit to number among your
prestigious family?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
E-exactly! Our family's incredible! After all, I can,
uh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I can eat fifty shrimp tempura bowls, fifty bowls of ramen, fifty pieces of fried chicken, and finish it off with ten actual buckets of pudding!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-well?! Are you able to do the same? If not,
then I won't ever acknowledge you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, woe upon me! I'm incapable of doing such!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Since things have come to this...
Princess!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Won't you flee with me to a far-flung country?
Take my hand, that we may throw ourselves upon
the tempestuous sea of fate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Father, isn't there anything we can do to
make you accept our engagement?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! L-like I said, it's because Oper—I mean, this
individual isn't able to eat enough shrimp
tempura bowls!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what genre this play was supposed
to be, but it's a full-on comedy now. The show
trips along the same way until the curtains fall.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! I was terrible out there! I'm so sorry, Opera
O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! What are you talking about? Just listen
to that crowd!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Spe! You were so funny!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I brought you something to snack on! You must
be hungry after that performance, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! Is that yakisoba and takoyaki?! You
brought so much!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! That just proves how delighted the
audience was with your performance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And what courage! You didn't hesitate to
volunteer as a replacement actor when you heard
of our plight!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though you were always on the cusp of being
overtaken by distress, you never broke character
as a ruler and carried on nobly!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have the makings of a star actor... You truly
embody the role of a ruler!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Me? A good ruler?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! But of course! There's nothing to
fear with me around!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems things didn't pan out the way she
expected, but Special Week was able to play a
fantastic(?) ruler, so all's well that ends well.
